title: Question: operator++ support
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Message: 401 from https://www.veripool.org



---

It seems that operator++ is supported within for statement, e.g.:

       for( int i=0; i<100; i++ ) begin

but not outside, e.g.:


       for( int i=0; i<100; i++ ) begin
          i++;
       end

which results in error:

%Error: testbench.v:27: syntax error, unexpected ++, expecting '=' or <=

Is there a document that describes which operators are implemented and in what context?
